response: The cities of Beitun, Xinjiang and Wafangdian are administrative categories classified as county-level cities. Beitun is a county-level city under the direct administration of the regional government, while Wafangdian is one of the two "northern county-level cities" under the administration of Dalian. Similarly, Xinjiang is a provincial-level autonomous region, but the cities mentioned are classified as county-level cities.
